789.reason: [The error line number should be the line of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon, but here it uses the position of the previous token (pos-1), which may not be the correct line number for the error. For example, in the test case, the missing semicolon after "printf" should report line 2, but the previous token might be on a different line.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The error line number should be the line of the last non-terminal before the missing semicolon, but here it uses the position of the previous token (pos-1), which may not be the correct line number for the error. For example, in the test case, the missing semicolon after "printf" should report line 2, but the previous token might be on a different line.]

1755.reason: Incorrect: using `repeat` results in duplicate "<UnaryExp>" lines. Should be only one "<UnaryExp>\n" after the simpleUnaryExp.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Incorrect: using `repeat` results in duplicate "<UnaryExp>" lines. Should be only one "<UnaryExp>\n" after the simpleUnaryExp.

303.reason: Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has insufficient elements; also does not check current token type.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has insufficient elements; also does not check current token type.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing pos+1 without checking bounds. If the current token is the last one, this crashes.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing pos+1 without checking if pos+1 < tokens.size(). If the last token is processed and it's not CONST, this will crash. Although in this specific test case main is detected early, this is a logical fragility. More importantly, if the parser fails to consume all tokens or misidentifies structure, this loop condition and access pattern are unsafe.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accessing tokens.get(this.pos + 1) without checking if pos + 1 is within bounds can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException, and more importantly, this logic fails to correctly identify MainFuncDef when the current token is 'int' at position pos]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing this.tokens.get(this.pos + 1) may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos is at the last token, and this condition fails to correctly identify main function when there are other tokens before it]

305.reason: Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has fewer than 3 elements.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Potential IndexOutOfBoundsException when tokens list has fewer than 3 elements.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing pos+2 without checking bounds.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: Accessing pos+2 without checking bounds.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accessing tokens.get(this.pos + 2) without bounds checking; also, this condition assumes FuncDef starts with a type followed by ident and LPARENT, but doesn't verify the first token is a valid FuncType, leading to misclassification of statements as declarations]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing this.tokens.get(this.pos + 2) may cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when pos is at the last or second-to-last token, leading to missed parsing of function definitions and improper error detection]

329.reason: IndexOutOfBoundsException: If pos is at the end of tokens (e.g., missing semicolon or EOF), this access crashes.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: If pos is at the end of tokens (e.g., missing semicolon or EOF), this access crashes.

788.reason: IndexOutOfBoundsException: If pos equals tokens.size() (EOF reached), this access crashes instead of recording error 'i'.

503.reason: IndexOutOfBoundsException: If pos is at the last token after incrementing, accessing tokens.get(pos) will throw an exception. This happens if a variable declaration ends the file or block without a semicolon or following token.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  IndexOutOfBoundsException: If pos is at the last token after incrementing, accessing tokens.get(pos) will throw an exception. This happens if a variable declaration ends the file or block without a semicolon or following token.

308.reason: [This assumes any non-const, non-main, non-func pattern must be a VarDecl, but in the test case, statements like printf(...) are incorrectly treated as VarDecl, causing parsing errors and preventing proper error detection for missing semicolons]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This assumes any non-const, non-main, non-func pattern must be a VarDecl, but in the test case, statements like printf(...) are incorrectly treated as VarDecl, causing parsing errors and preventing proper error detection for missing semicolons]
